summary: Middle East conflict (Strait of Hormuz closure, damage to oil infrastructure) driving energy price spike and inflation. IMF projects 2026 global growth at 3.1%, inflation 4.4% under base case; adverse scenario cuts growth to 2.5%. Other flashpoints: U.S.-Venezuela tensions, civil unrest in Iran, NATO-Greenland posture. Tariffs and export controls escalating. Defensive sectors outperforming; financials/energy supported.
